name: Holiday Wash Buckler
description: Holiday Wash Buckler is a Christmas counterpart of Wash Buckler in Skylanders: Lost Islands.
biography: Holiday Wash Buckler is a Christmas counterpart of Wash Buckler in Skylanders: Lost Islands. On December 2013 you would need to play Skylanders: Battlegrounds in order to get him.
quote: Here to spread the cheer is Holiday Wash Buckler!

story.content: Holiday Wash Buckler is a Christmas counterpart of Wash Buckler in Skylanders: Lost Islands. On December 2013 you would need to play Skylanders: Battlegrounds in order to get him.

content: Here to spread the cheer is Holiday Wash Buckler!

trivia: He, Admiral Thumpback and Frosted Food Fight are the only Lost Islands Exclusive Skylanders who are not Grand Prizes of the Wishing Well.
However, Holiday Wash Buckler could be earned from the Wishing Well for a limited time when past Alter Egos returned.
Holiday Wash Buckler, Lucky Boomer, Hoppity Pop Fizz and Admiral Thumpback are the only Lost Islands exclusive Skylanders of 2013 without a specific house of their own.
gameplay: Holiday Wash Buckler is an Alter Ego who appears in Skylanders: Lost Islands. To obtain him in December 2013, players were required to play Skylanders: Battlegrounds. As an Alter Ego, he features a unique holiday-themed appearance and specialized animations, such as his idle and poke animation.
